content.text: The block to remove is lines 330 through 363 (the `.descriptionInput` rules plus the blank line before `.shareButton`). Now I will remove those lines.

input.command: node -e "const fs=require('fs');const p=require('path');const f=p.join('C:','Users','johnm','iskrib_v3','client','src','components','HomePage','Canvas','CanvasEditor.module.css');const c=fs.readFileSync(f,'utf8');const lines=c.split('\n');lines.splice(329,34);fs.writeFileSync(f,lines.join('\n'),'utf8');console.log('Removed lines 330-363. New line count:',lines.length)"
